what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment, linking a channel-memory entry to the image asset image://design-source/vt-gatehouse/p-2.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares an attachment id att-b6090543 in channel design-source.
The target field is a URI: image://design-source/vt-gatehouse/p-2.
standouts: The target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to design-source/vt-gatehouse/p-2.
It is a ledger-style attachment record rather than a document.
Only structural metadata is provided; no caption or description.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added.
References external assets via a custom image:// URI.
concerns: No caption, description, or alt text for the image.
No explicit link to the parent channel-memory entry it attaches to.
The image:// target cannot be verified from this file alone.
Minimal content makes interpretation dependent on external context.
notes: A sparse metadata stub that registers an image attachment for a design-source channel memory item.
questions: Which channel-memory entry does this attachment belong to?
What does 'p-2' refer to (page, plate, part, panel)?
Who added the attachment and what prompted it?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is an attachment record, and it does record an image attachment; purpose matches content.
intention_signals: It appears designed to catalog and point to image assets associated with design-source channel memory entries so they can be retrieved, audited, and correlated.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI scheme for addressing image assets within a channel namespace.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped pointer that associates a channel-memory attachment identifier with a specific image asset, supporting asset tracking and later retrieval.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment ledger entry that maps attachment att-b6090543 in the design-source channel to the image asset image://design-source/vt-gatehouse/p-2, recorded with an added timestamp and no body content.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to register an image attachment reference for a design-source channel memory item.
